name: canvas-parent-mcp
description: Canvas LMS (Instructure) MCP — student/observer read access with optional file download

canvas_base_url.title: Canvas base URL (https://...)
canvas_base_url.description: Canvas instance base URL, e.g. https://cms.instructure.com

canvas_token.title: Personal access token (recommended)
canvas_token.description: Canvas personal access token. Generate via Account → Settings → '+ New Access Token'. Pick ONE auth mode: this token, OR username+password, OR the OAuth triple.

canvas_username.title: Username / login email (auto-login)
canvas_username.description: Canvas username (or login email) for the /login/canvas form. Set together with canvas_password when your admin has disabled token creation; the MCP auto-logs-in on first request and re-mints cookies on 401. Direct Canvas accounts only — no SAML/Google/Microsoft SSO or 2FA.

canvas_password.title: Password (auto-login)
canvas_password.description: Canvas password. Required only when using username/password auto-login. Stored locally in the bundle config — keep it private.

canvas_client_id.title: OAuth client ID (optional)
canvas_client_id.description: Canvas Developer Key client ID. Required only if you're using the OAuth refresh-token mode.

canvas_client_secret.title: OAuth client secret (optional)
canvas_client_secret.description: Canvas Developer Key client secret. Required only if you're using the OAuth refresh-token mode.

canvas_refresh_token.title: OAuth refresh token (optional)
canvas_refresh_token.description: Canvas OAuth refresh token (bootstrap with canvas-parent-mcp-qr-login). Required only if using OAuth mode.

canvas_name.title: Display name (optional)
canvas_name.description: Friendly name for the Canvas instance (e.g. "CMS"). Defaults to the host portion of the base URL.
